title: Easy Shulkers
description: A datapack that makes an easier recipe for shulker boxes availible
body:
**Easy Shulker Boxes**

This Datapack Adds A Recipe To Craft Shulker Boxes **Without** Shulker Shells

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2834dfc2461b11e9965423aae6767e739db98b46.png)

The Command To Unlock This Recipe is:
_/recipe give @s shulker:box_
